task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sample Order Lines' in the Data Elements panel on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Regional Sales Summary' bar chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a bar chart visualization on the canvas with the title 'Regional Sales Summary'. The chart should display 'Sales' on the Y-axis and 'Region' on the X-axis.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Order Details' table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table visualization on the canvas with the title 'Order Details'. The table headers must include 'Customer Name', 'Order ID', 'Sales', and 'Profit'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the bar chart is configured to act as a filter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Use as Filter' icon (often a funnel symbol) toggled on or highlighted in the toolbar/menu of the 'Regional Sales Summary' bar chart.

task_completion.description: Verify that the dashboard is currently filtered to the 'East' region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'East' bar in the bar chart being selected or highlighted (other bars may be dimmed). The 'Order Details' table should visually reflect this filter, or there should be an active filter token showing Region = East.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workbook is saved as 'Regional_Drilldown'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Regional_Drilldown' in the top title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop window or in a successful Save dialog/notification.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Oracle Analytics Desktop application interface with menus, data panels, and canvas, not a terminal or command prompt.

integrity.description: Verify the visualizations are genuinely rendered by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The charts and tables should have the standard Oracle Analytics Desktop styling, tooltips, and UI elements, rather than looking like pasted images or mocked HTML.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the requirements into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) open with the task description or fake output text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected filename is 'Regional_Drilldown.dva' (often displayed as 'Regional_Drilldown' in the UI). The dashboard must contain exactly 2 visualizations: a Bar Chart ('Regional Sales Summary') and a Table ('Order Details'). The required columns used in these visualizations are 'Region', 'Sales', 'Customer Name', 'Order ID', and 'Profit'. The interactive filter target is the 'East' region, meaning the 'East' bar must be clicked/selected to filter the table.
